videos.relevance: Directly about cerebral microbleed MR detection and interpretation.

videos.relevance: CAA case context for peripheral chronic hemorrhagic findings and lobar microbleed pattern.

videos.relevance: General intracranial hemorrhage differential context, including systematic approach, cavernous malformation, metastasis, CAA, and venous infarct cases.

videos.relevance: CAA clinical context and relationship to lobar hemorrhagic markers including microbleeds.

videos.relevance: Small-vessel disease context including microbleeds, WMH, lacunes, and perivascular spaces; lower authority than radiology lectures.

videos.title: Microbleeds on MRI SWI Explained | How to Identify Cerebral Microbleeds
videos.relevance: Potential visual quick reference for SWI microbleed identification; needs credibility review.

videos.title: Cerebral microbleeds and cognitive decline
videos.relevance: Direct microbleed discussion covering MRI appearance, cognitive decline, and lobar versus basal ganglia distribution.

videos.title: Biomarkers in small vessel disease
videos.relevance: Small-vessel-disease biomarker context including microbleeds, WMH, perivascular spaces, and cortical microinfarcts.

videos.relevance: CAA diagnostic context that complements MRI hemorrhagic markers and Boston criteria discussion.

videos.relevance: Approach to number, location, patient age, and associated findings when interpreting hemorrhagic lesions.

videos.title: Imaging intracranial hemorrhage - imaging appearance and evolution
videos.relevance: Blood-product evolution context for separating acute macrohemorrhage from chronic microbleed susceptibility foci.

videos.relevance: Cavernous malformation mimic context for multiple hemorrhagic lesions of different ages.

videos.relevance: Companion page for cavernous malformation mimic review and suspected hemorrhagic lesion workup.

videos.relevance: Lower-authority but relevant MRI overview of small-vessel-disease markers including microbleeds.
